top_signals.title: Japan, China lead foreign government retreat from U.S. Treasurys as Iran war fallout stokes currency fears
top_signals.summary: The sell-off came as the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran conflict and resulting surge in crude oil prices sent the yen and other Asian currencies tumbling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oasis Mgmt Fischer on Investment Strategies
top_signals.summary:
Seth Fischer, Founder and CIO of Oasis Management, discusses his outlook and investment strategies for the Japanese market.
He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts from the sidelines of Sohn Hong Kong Investment Leaders Conference on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump’s IRS settlement includes dropping tax cases and audits
top_signals.summary: The accord represents a major triumph by U.S. President Donald Trump over the Internal Revenue Service, but has also been called "a breathtaking abuse of the tax and legal system."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Carney fast-tracks $1.5B Nouveau Monde Graphite mine — Canada’s answer to China’s 80% supply control
top_signals.summary: Ottawa backs the Quebec-based project, billed as the biggest graphite mine in the G7.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Huawei zero-day attack behind last year’s crash of Luxembourg's entire telecoms network
top_signals.summary: There is no evidence that the incident has recurred, but the flaw remains unexplained and has not been publicly acknowledged by the company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
